description: End-to-end AI knowledge graph system that ingests unstructured organizational data and converts it into a searchable semantic graph. Implements entity extraction, graph construction, hybrid semantic search, and role-based access control with audit trails using Python and PostgreSQL.
Reference implementation of an AI Agent using Claude Agent SDK. Transforms videos into knowledge graphs via MCP tools: transcription, entity extraction, graph building, natural language querying.
SmartMemory plugin for Obsidian — entity extraction, graph, contradiction, search, recall, autolink, suggestions
Knowledge graph subsystem extracted from RagWeave (entity extraction, graph storage, community detection, query expansion).

A powerful system for building, querying, and visualizing knowledge graphs using AI. Includes NLP-based entity extraction, graph database integration, and interactive visualization dashboard with search, filters, and relationship exploration.

A repository showcasing the integration of LangChain, OpenAI, and Neo4j to build and visualize knowledge graphs from textual data. The project demonstrates entity extraction, graph construction, and hybrid search capabilities using advanced AI and graph technologies.
